hero.title: Let's Explore the
hero.paragraph: Whether you're a prospective PhD supervisor, a collaborator, or a fellow enthusiast, I'd love to hear from you.

form.title: Collaborate or Supervise
form.desc: I am actively seeking PhD candidacy collaborations and am open to discussing research opportunities in stellar evolution and dark matter modelling.
form.cardDesc: Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.
form.successDesc: I'll get back to you within 48 hours.

infoCards.title: Quick Responses
infoCards.desc: Typical response time for academic inquiries is 1-2 days.
